title: Michelin Plate Hero Shot
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fine-dining hero photography where plated dishes are staged like commercial campaign images with strict culinary realism, premium surfaces, and editorial restraint.

en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for fine-dining hero photography where plated dishes are staged like commercial campaign images with strict culinary realism, premium surfaces, and editorial restraint.

zh-CN.title: 米其林餐盘 Hero Shot
zh-CN.description: 以高级餐饮商业拍摄为核心的主题,要求餐盘摆盘、材质、灯光与留白都达到米其林级 hero shot 的精确控制。
